records.m_Talk_ENG: The earthquakes and monsters invading the village. I know something was off!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The earthquakes and monsters invading the village. I know something was off!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The earthquakes and monsters invading the village. I know something was off!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No wonder there were so many omens recently! The world is going to end just like it said in the Apocalypse Augury!
records.m_Talk_DEU: No wonder there were so many omens recently! The world is going to end just like it said in the Apocalypse Augury!
records.m_Talk_FRA: No wonder there were so many omens recently! The world is going to end just like it said in the Apocalypse Augury!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, quiet! Enough with the doom talk!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, quiet! Enough with the doom talk!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, quiet! Enough with the doom talk!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you saw it too, Miss Morgana. It was no doubt the brand of the traitor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you saw it too, Miss Morgana. It was no doubt the brand of the traitor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you saw it too, Miss Morgana. It was no doubt the brand of the traitor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The end will come because of the traitor!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The end will come because of the traitor!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The end will come because of the traitor!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Letting an outsider from the gelid lands in here without even checking if she had the mark...! Did the High Priest make a mistake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Letting an outsider from the gelid lands in here without even checking if she had the mark...! Did the High Priest make a mistake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Letting an outsider from the gelid lands in here without even checking if she had the mark...! Did the High Priest make a mistake?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Merlin making a mistake...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Merlin making a mistake...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Merlin making a mistake...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ma'am... are you sure...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ma'am... are you sure...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ma'am... are you sure...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In return, please keep what you saw today a secret, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: In return, please keep what you saw today a secret, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: In return, please keep what you saw today a secret, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The people are worrying.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The people are worrying.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The people are worrying.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You should go out there and reassure them, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You should go out there and reassure them, Miss Morgana.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You should go out there and reassure them, Miss Morgana.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go talk to Merlin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go talk to Merlin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go talk to Merlin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Until then, don't go looking for or even touch Lugh! Okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Until then, don't go looking for or even touch Lugh! Okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Until then, don't go looking for or even touch Lugh! Okay?!

records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was a fool to let my guard down. I shouldn't have been caught like that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was a fool to let my guard down. I shouldn't have been caught like that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was a fool to let my guard down. I shouldn't have been caught like that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even now, I'm just thinking about myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even now, I'm just thinking about myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even now, I'm just thinking about myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am such a selfish person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am such a selfish person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am such a selfish person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana's expression... She seemed extremely flustered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana's expression... She seemed extremely flustered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana's expression... She seemed extremely flustered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure she's thinking that I fooled her. Because even though I had a chance to tell her about the mark, I didn't.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure she's thinking that I fooled her. Because even though I had a chance to tell her about the mark, I didn't.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure she's thinking that I fooled her. Because even though I had a chance to tell her about the mark, I didn't.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Guess I'm paying for my hesitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Guess I'm paying for my hesitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Guess I'm paying for my hesitation.

Just like that time
8v

8v

Just like that time

records.m_Talk_ENG: WHOAAA!!!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I got her! I really got her!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I got her! I really got her!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I got her! I really got her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes! We caught the devil!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes! We caught the devil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes! We caught the devil!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You are... those kids from before?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You are... those kids from before?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You are... those kids from before?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh, I can't move when I'm upside down. Why are you doing this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh, I can't move when I'm upside down. Why are you doing this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh, I can't move when I'm upside down. Why are you doing this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a trap we made to catch you! You devil!
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a trap we made to catch you! You devil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a trap we made to catch you! You devil!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Devil...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Devil...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Devil...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Blech... Um, I'm not feeling so good right now, so could you let me down?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Blech... Um, I'm not feeling so good right now, so could you let me down?

records.m_Talk_DEU: The devil's suffering! I think the trap's working!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The devil's suffering! I think the trap's working!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Um...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Um...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think we are being too harsh on her? She might not be a devil.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think we are being too harsh on her? She might not be a devil.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think we are being too harsh on her? She might not be a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? Did you forget what the adults told us? It's impossible to find a living person out in the gelid lands in the first place!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? Did you forget what the adults told us? It's impossible to find a living person out in the gelid lands in the first place!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? Did you forget what the adults told us? It's impossible to find a living person out in the gelid lands in the first place!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's a devil! Here to trick us and steal our souls! Monsters like her deserve to be punished!
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's a devil! Here to trick us and steal our souls! Monsters like her deserve to be punished!
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's a devil! Here to trick us and steal our souls! Monsters like her deserve to be punished!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Karolis, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Karolis, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Karolis, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Gasp* The devil knows your name! I think she's after your soul, cap!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Gasp* The devil knows your name! I think she's after your soul, cap!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Gasp* The devil knows your name! I think she's after your soul, cap!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...! I've never told you my name, but you already seem to know it. You really are a devil.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But we caught you. Your tricks won't work on us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: But we caught you. Your tricks won't work on us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: But we caught you. Your tricks won't work on us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay! Let's begin the operation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay! Let's begin the operation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay! Let's begin the operation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? W-wait...! If you push me like that from both sides...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? W-wait...! If you push me like that from both sides...!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh... I'm getting dizzy... I feel queasy...

records.m_Talk_DEU: Please... stopppp...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please... stopppp...

records.m_Talk_FRA: Her voice is getting weaker! I think our plan is working!

records.m_Talk_FRA: I think something that shouldn't come out will...!

records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear that? Maybe the devil's true form is hiding inside her!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Karolis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Karolis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Karolis.

records.m_Talk_DEU: I heard that your mother got injured when the monsters attacked the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I heard that your mother got injured when the monsters attacked the village.

records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't you talk about my mom, devil!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't you talk about my mom, devil!

records.m_Talk_DEU: Um, Karolis?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Um, Karolis?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-that's...! Because that devil is trying to use her cunning tricks on us!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm no devil, but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm no devil, but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm no devil, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was born with the brand of the traitor that ordinary people don't have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Because of this mark, I was ostracized back home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because of this mark, I was ostracized back home.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I hid it because I wanted to fit in with the others... but got caught in the end doing something presumptuous.

records.m_Talk_DEU: I regretted it every day since I left home and wandered the gelid lands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I regretted it every day since I left home and wandered the gelid lands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I didn't get greedy in wanting to make friends, no one would've gotten hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I didn't get greedy in wanting to make friends, no one would've gotten hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I didn't get greedy in wanting to make friends, no one would've gotten hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But still... I made the same mistake here.

records.m_Talk_FRA: But still... I made the same mistake here.

root.m_Talk_FRA: What? Did you forget what the adults told us? It's impossible to find a living person out in the gelid lands in the first place!

root.m_Talk_FRA: She's a devil! Here to trick us and steal our souls! Monsters like her deserve to be punished!

root.m_Talk_FRA: If that will lessen your fears and pain...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think that will be the best option.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think that will be the best option.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think that will be the best option.

root.m_Talk_ENG:

8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: What was that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What was that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What was that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: KYAAAH!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: KYAAAH!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: KYAAAH!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: MONSTERS! RUN!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: MONSTERS! RUN!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: MONSTERS! RUN!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters...? Why are they here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters...? Why are they here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters...? Why are they here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stay away from our village, you monsters!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stay away from our village, you monsters!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stay away from our village, you monsters!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Krrgh...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Krrgh...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Krrgh...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Watch out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Watch out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Watch out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She killed a monster... in one blow?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She killed a monster... in one blow?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She killed a monster... in one blow?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did you do that? While hanging upside down...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did you do that? While hanging upside down...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did you do that? While hanging upside down...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's too early to rest easy! More are coming!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's too early to rest easy! More are coming!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's too early to rest easy! More are coming!

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-we need to tell the adults...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-we need to tell the adults...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-we need to tell the adults...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But if we leave her alone like this...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But if we leave her alone like this...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But if we leave her alone like this...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll be fine!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll be fine!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll be fine!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go get Morgana, please!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go get Morgana, please!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go get Morgana, please!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ngh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ngh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: D-don't die! I'll be back with her before you know it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: D-don't die! I'll be back with her before you know it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: D-don't die! I'll be back with her before you know it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Go! Now!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Go! Now!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Go! Now!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So...
root.m_Talk_DEU: So...
root.m_Talk_FRA: So...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You defeated all these monsters while hanging upside down?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You defeated all these monsters while hanging upside down?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You defeated all these monsters while hanging upside down?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... There weren't a lot of them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... There weren't a lot of them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... There weren't a lot of them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But some might still be on the outskirts of the village.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But some might still be on the outskirts of the village.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But some might still be on the outskirts of the village.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You might be right, considering the attacks we've been getting recently.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You might be right, considering the attacks we've been getting recently.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You might be right, considering the attacks we've been getting recently.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have to clear out the outskirts later.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have to clear out the outskirts later.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have to clear out the outskirts later.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Blech... Could you cut me down first? I'm still holding it in, but... I'm almost at my limits here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Blech... Could you cut me down first? I'm still holding it in, but... I'm almost at my limits here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Blech... Could you cut me down first? I'm still holding it in, but... I'm almost at my limits here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oww... Whew.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oww... Whew.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oww... Whew.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This trap. It's Karolis' doing, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: This trap. It's Karolis' doing, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: This trap. It's Karolis' doing, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, did he tell you that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did he tell you that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, did he tell you that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. But he did drag me out all the way here and then snuck away after seeing that you were safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. But he did drag me out all the way here and then snuck away after seeing that you were safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. But he did drag me out all the way here and then snuck away after seeing that you were safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure that rascal was lashing out at innocent people again, talking nonsense about devils and whatnot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure that rascal was lashing out at innocent people again, talking nonsense about devils and whatnot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure that rascal was lashing out at innocent people again, talking nonsense about devils and whatnot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... but at least he kept his promise of bringing you here, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... but at least he kept his promise of bringing you here, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... but at least he kept his promise of bringing you here, Morgana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm really going to teach him a lesson this time!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm really going to teach him a lesson this time!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm really going to teach him a lesson this time!

root.m_Talk_ENG: He's around the same age as me, but why's he acting so childish? It's unforgivable!
root.m_Talk_DEU: He's around the same age as me, but why's he acting so childish? It's unforgivable!
root.m_Talk_FRA: He's around the same age as me, but why's he acting so childish? It's unforgivable!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana, could you tell Merlin about what happened here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana, could you tell Merlin about what happened here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana, could you tell Merlin about what happened here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's a big deal that monsters attacked the village twice already.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's a big deal that monsters attacked the village twice already.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's a big deal that monsters attacked the village twice already.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, I will.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, I will.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, I will.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's go together. Maybe it'll clear up the misunderstandings the villagers have...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's go together. Maybe it'll clear up the misunderstandings the villagers have...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's go together. Maybe it'll clear up the misunderstandings the villagers have...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...once we report that you single-handedly defeated all the monsters yourself, Ms. Lugh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...once we report that you single-handedly defeated all the monsters yourself, Ms. Lugh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...once we report that you single-handedly defeated all the monsters yourself, Ms. Lugh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No. This isn't some misunderstanding they have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No. This isn't some misunderstanding they have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No. This isn't some misunderstanding they have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You learned about it too, so you know what I'm talking about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You learned about it too, so you know what I'm talking about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You learned about it too, so you know what I'm talking about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And what this mark means.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And what this mark means.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And what this mark means.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Um... Lugh...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Um... Lugh...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Um... Lugh...?

I

root.m_Talk_ENG: Morgana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Morgana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Morgana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not feeling so good right now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not feeling so good right now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not feeling so good right now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You go on ahead first.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You go on ahead first.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You go on ahead first.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm exhausted from hanging from a tree for so long... I need some time to rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm exhausted from hanging from a tree for so long... I need some time to rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm exhausted from hanging from a tree for so long... I need some time to rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh... right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh... right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh... right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I guess you're right, because you weren't feeling all too good before.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I guess you're right, because you weren't feeling all too good before.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I guess you're right, because you weren't feeling all too good before.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go tell Merlin. You should go get some rest. I'll give those kids a stern warning.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go tell Merlin. You should go get some rest. I'll give those kids a stern warning.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go tell Merlin. You should go get some rest. I'll give those kids a stern warning.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks, Morgana.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks, Morgana.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I hope the best for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I hope the best for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I hope the best for you.
